name: Akebia Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview We are a fully integrated biopharmaceutical company with two commercial products for patients impacted by kidney disease. We have built a business focused on developing and commercializing innovative therapeutics that we believe serve as a foundation for future growth, including by contributing net product revenue to support the development and advancement of our robust pipeline of mid-stage programs targeting rare kidney diseases and early-stage programs targeting kidney disease...
